title: My Best Friend Is a Ghost
text:
## My Best Friend Is a Ghost

This might sound {adjective}, but my {adjective} friend is a ghost. We met in {number} grade at school while they were {verb ending in -ing} the {place}. Their name is {person} and they were {number} years old when they died. No one can {verb} my friend but me. They have {color} hair and are {adverb} {adjective}, and their clothes are {adjective}. Having an invisible friend is {adjective}, but they always win at {verb} and seek.
